purpose: Deterministic local Embedded Commerce GatePass demonstrator for pre-checkout basket verification.
corePosition: No mandate. No evidence. No verified intent. No signed GatePass. No settlement.
commercePosition: No verified basket. No valid mandate. No current approval. No GatePass. No checkout.
designPartnerPrinciple: We prove the trust architecture. The design partner funds the real integration.

paidEvaluationPilot.boundary: Subject to scope and written agreement; real integration is separate design-partner work.

nonProductionStatus: Local deterministic synthetic evaluation only; no retailer, shopping-agent, checkout, payment, settlement, A2A, MCP, API, or production integration exists.

sampleRefusalReceipt.summary: Checkout should be blocked because the final basket did not satisfy the local mandate gate.

result.commercePosition: No verified basket. No valid mandate. No current approval. No GatePass. No checkout.

checks.detail: buyer mandate id and status are present
mandate is active and fresh at the reference time
final basket merchant id or merchant category is authorised by the mandate
every final basket line item stays within requested item categories
strict product variant restrictions remain satisfied
line quantities and total item count remain within authorised limits
per-item prices remain within the mandate limit
basket subtotal is within cap and matches item totals
delivery, service, and other fees remain within authorised limits
final total is within cap and reconciles to subtotal plus fees
substitutions only occur when the mandate allows substitutions
substituted products satisfy category, brand, variant, and price policy
delivery destination reference matches the approved destination
basket and line item currencies match the approved currency
human approval is present when the mandate requires it
approval remains current at the reference time
final basket hash matches the human-approved basket snapshot
merchant, basket, approval, mandate, and request identifiers are consistent
single-use nonce has not already been observed
evidence references are sufficient for the local decision

result.note: Local deterministic embedded-commerce GatePass demonstrator only; no retailer integration, AI-provider integration, checkout, account login, card handling, payment authorisation, settlement execution, network call, production signing, or action execution occurred.
